secondary_signals.title: Property prices record slowest increase since Q1 2019
secondary_signals.summary: ​ Residential property prices in the Philippines rose by 1.6 percent year-on-year (y-o-y) in Q4 2025, easing from 1.9 percent in Q3 2025.
